The '''Imperial Ballet Company''' was a renowned ballet company based on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Attending a performance by the Company was part of the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]{{'s}} [[Grand Galactic Tour]].<ref name="RPG" />
